topPlaces.name: Veeravanallur
topPlaces.description: Veeravanallur () is a selection grade special panchayat town in the Cheranmahadevi taluk of Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvidaimarudur Conservation Reserve
topPlaces.description: Tiruppadaimarathur Conservation Reserve is an IUCN Category V protected bird nesting area in the 2.84 hectares (7.0 acres) compound of Siva temple in Thiruppudaimarudur village, Tirunelveli District, Tamil Nadu, South India. It was declared 14 February 2005 and is the first Conservation Reserve to be established in India.

topPlaces.name: Singamparai
topPlaces.description: Singamparai is a village in Mukkudal Town Panchayat, situated just north of Mukkudal in Tirunelveli District, Tamil Nadu, India, with the Population about 5000 live in the village.

topPlaces.name: Gadananathi River
topPlaces.description: Gadananathi (கடனாநதி), also called as Gadananadhi or Gatananadhi or Kadananathi or Kadananadhi is a river flowing in the Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Gadananathi originates from Agasthyamalai Biosphere Reserve.

topPlaces.name: Ambasamudram block
topPlaces.description: Ambasamudram block is a revenue block in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 12 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Singampatti
topPlaces.description: Singampatti . This palaiyam headed 24 of 72 palaiyams was located in present day Ambasamudram taluk, two miles from the spurs of the Western Ghats, in Tirunelveli district.

topPlaces.name: Mukkudal
topPlaces.description: Mukkudal is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Cheranmadevi
topPlaces.description: Cheranmahadevi is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Veeravanallur () is a selection grade special panchayat town in the Cheranmahadevi taluk of Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Tiruppadaimarathur Conservation Reserve is an IUCN Category V protected bird nesting area in the 2.84 hectares (7.0 acres) compound of Siva temple in Thiruppudaimarudur village, Tirunelveli District, Tamil Nadu, South India. It was declared 14 February 2005 and is the first Conservation Reserve to be established in India.
Singamparai is a village in Mukkudal Town Panchayat, situated just north of Mukkudal in Tirunelveli District, Tamil Nadu, India, with the Population about 5000 live in the village.

Gadananathi (கடனாநதி), also called as Gadananadhi or Gatananadhi or Kadananathi or Kadananadhi is a river flowing in the Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Gadananathi originates from Agasthyamalai Biosphere Reserve.
Ambasamudram block is a revenue block in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 12 panchayat villages.
Singampatti . This palaiyam headed 24 of 72 palaiyams was located in present day Ambasamudram taluk, two miles from the spurs of the Western Ghats, in Tirunelveli district.
Mukkudal is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Cheranmahadevi is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruppudaimarudur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruppudaimarudur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruppudaimarudur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruppudaimarudur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruppudaimarudur?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruppudaimarudur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruppudaimarudur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Veeravanallur, Tiruvidaimarudur Conservation Reserve, Singamparai, Gadananathi River, Ambasamudram block.
